---
title: "Deep Learning Theory: Mathematical Foundations for Scientific Machine Learning"
subtitle: "SCIML-002 | Track D — Scientific ML"
description: "The mathematical theory underlying deep learning: approximation theory, optimization landscape, generalization, and architecture design. Provides the theoretical foundation for all SciML methods."
date: "2026-04-11"
toc: true
toc-depth: 3
number-sections: true
---

# Deep Learning Theory: Mathematical Foundations for Scientific Machine Learning

*Content not yet generated.*

Run the generation pipeline and then `src/quarto_export.jl` to populate this page.
